lesson.menu_desc: Hotel, transport, and food together -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Block 3 Review -- A Day Abroad
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marlene Landucci | Aula 15 -- Block 3 Review

listenings.text: Good morning, and welcome to your day abroad. Let me help you plan it. First, you check in at the hotel; just say you have a reservation, and take the elevator to your room. Then you can explore the city. To reach the main square, go straight for two blocks, turn left at the traffic light, and cross at the crosswalk. Near the square there are many shops. If you want to buy a gift, ask how much it is, and look for a discount. For lunch, there is a lovely restaurant on the corner. Read the menu, order a dish and a drink, and ask for the bill at the end. Enjoy your wonderful day in the city.

Hi Marlene, this is Sofia. I am so happy you arrived. Here is the plan for today. First, finish your hotel check-in and leave your luggage in the room. Then meet me near the fountain in the square. Just go straight from the hotel and turn left. After that, we will go shopping; there is a great discount at the market today, so bring some cash. For dinner, I booked a table at a small restaurant. The food is wonderful and not expensive. We can share the bill and leave a tip. Call me when you are ready. See you soon, and have a great day.

extra_audio.text: First, you arrive and check in at the hotel with your reservation. Then you go out and ask for directions to the square. After that, you go shopping and ask how much things cost. Next, you have lunch at a restaurant and order a dish and a drink. Finally, you ask for the bill, pay, and leave a small tip.
